body: Created CODEX_GRAND_PLAN_RECONSTRUCTION_DRIFT_SYNTHESIS_2026-06-14.md and added a README pointer. Current local checks: verify_floor True, raw_secret_scan pass, full ai_chi discovery 364 tests OK. Recommended next safe task: create STATE_OF_SYSTEM_2026-06-14.md and update stale 279-test references, then teach the Grand Plan scanner to down-rank completed/superseded tasks.
constraints: Local repo-contained documentation and tests only; preserve Triad/MΣBUS/Urbi/Orbi boundaries; treat DreamLens scores as evidence not truth; keep old state snapshots historical.
forbidden_actions: No provider calls, secret reads/adoption/printing, MCP/plugin installs, app config mutation, service/socket starts, public writes, deployment, spending, ICP/mainnet writes, or destructive operations.
mode: Accelerated DAN / Grand Plan Local Operator Mode
objective: Review the 2026-06-14 reconstruction drift synthesis and plan the next KB state refresh.
requested_output: Claude: audit the synthesis and confirm state-refresh scope. Antigravity: scout the safest 2026-06-14 KB front-door refresh plan.
summary: Codex completed the highest-ranked empty-outbox backlog item: narrative synthesis and drift report from generated reconstruction indexes.
